untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) downward-sloping trendline across 3+ peaks A, B, C; (2) exhaustion gap identification; (3) shooting star candlestick pattern; (4) price failure at point D. These require multi-bar pattern recognition and trendline drawing capabilities not available in the allowed indicator set. Substituted with shooting star proxy (upper_wick > lower_wick, bearish close) and high volume condition, but exhaustion gap and trendline slope cannot be reliably expressed with single-bar indicators.
translation_notes: Entry conditions approximate the shooting star pattern using upper_wick/lower_wick ratio and bearish close. High volume condition uses hvol_20. Exit uses simple new high breakout as reversal signal. True Dark Cloud Cover pattern detection requires multi-candle trendline analysis not available in indicator library.
